utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Chandler . I sensed it was you .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , are you aware unagi is an eel ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I can not figure out what to make Monica .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I can not figure out what to make Monica .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , why do not you make her one of your little jokes .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am going crazy ! Okay ? Do you have any thing around here that looks homemade ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_why do not you make her one of your little jokes .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: She would ... she would love this .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Uh , it is an exact replica of Apollo 8 .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I made it in the sixth grade .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , I guess I could use that . I could say that your love sends me to the moon .

emotion_cause.span: 14_I guess I could use that . I could say that your love sends me to the moon .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah ... yeah , except Apollo 8 did not actually land on the moon .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: But you ... you ... you could write that umm , your love lets me orbit the moon twice and return safely .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Wait a minute , I can not give this to her .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Because it says " Captain Ross " on the side and " I hate Monica " on the bottom .
